summary: The video captures a daytime urban street scene viewed from inside a vehicle. A cyclist appears suddenly on the road, prompting the driver to halt briefly before proceeding cautiously.

events_timeline.event: A white SUV drives past on the left side of the road.
A cyclist emerges from behind the护栏 (fence) on the right side of the road.
The cyclist crosses the road ahead of the vehicle.
The cyclist disappears from view as the vehicle continues forward.

uncertainties: The cyclist's full identity and intent remain unclear.
Precise timing of the cyclist's emergence is uncertain.

risk_assessment.why: The primary risk arises from the cyclist’s sudden appearance, which necessitated brief braking. However, this minor disruption does not escalate into a severe incident.
